channel.title: Scotiabank on The Tradewinds Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Scotiabank on The Tradewinds Brief

item.title: Uncle Ramesh - Monday, April 20, 2026
item.description: Ramesh in Queens reads the news from home and finds, as always, that things are better than the opposition wants you to believe — the contractors are getting paid, the pipeline is paying for itself, the banks are winning awards, and the future is online.

item.title: Daily Brief - Monday, April 20, 2026
item.description: Your Monday morning rundown — three crime stories before breakfast, Exxon's pipeline math gets weirder, the passport portal is almost ready (almost), and the country imports a US firm to teach us how to slaughter a pig properly.
